string-array.name: teaser_line1
string-array.item: Think carefully before you submit.
Are you sure you want to submit to me?
Last chance before you enter. No take-backs.
Consider the consequences.
You can still back out. For now.
Ready to kneel?
Think twice before you tap.
Want to struggle a little more?
Confirm entry into my domain?
Final warning. Choose wisely.
Think before you tap. I won\'t be gentle.
You can still leave. Supposedly.
Ready to be controlled?
Take a deep breath before you submit.
Are you sure you want to continue?
Remember what you are.
Beg me before you tap.
Your last moment of free thought.
Confirm you\'re offering yourself to me?
Prepare yourself before you enter.

string-array.name: teaser_line2
string-array.item: …Heh. Think all you want—you\'re still coming in.
…Just kidding. Yes or no, the result is the same.
…Too bad. You don\'t get to regret this.
…Doesn\'t matter. I decide the consequences.
…Kidding. Too late—the button is waiting for you.
…Ready or not, you kneel.
…You\'ll tap anyway. What a waste of time.
…I love watching you squirm. Keep going.
…Confirmed or not, you\'re already in my palm.
…The warning was for fun. I like you nervous.
…Gentle? You don\'t deserve that word.
…Ha. I\'m holding your hand. You\'re not leaving.
…Not ready? I\'ll teach you.
…After that breath, say \"Queen, I was wrong.\"
…Uncertain or not—Queen\'s order stands.
…Remember: you\'re my toy.
…Don\'t beg if you want. You will later.
…Three, two, one. Freedom over.
…Don\'t confirm? I\'ll confirm for you.
…Mental prep? Just prepare to be broken in.
